_comment: Endurance scenarios with Intent routing. Tests whether deterministic tool dispatch (TALKBOT_LOCAL_DIRECT_TOOL_ROUTING=1) solves the repeated-store-bypass failure documented in LESSONS_LEARNED.md. LLM mode scores 0% on all endurance scenarios due to implicit few-shot shortcutting. Run: uv run python scripts/benchmark_conversations.py --matrix benchmarks/model_matrix.endurance_intent.json --scenarios tests/conversations/endurance --local-server-url http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1 --name endurance-intent-$(date +%Y%m%d) --no-publish

profiles._comment: LLM mode control — expected 0% on endurance (repeated-store-bypass baseline). Documents the floor.
profiles.name: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8-llm
profiles.system_prompt: You are being evaluated for tool-use reliability. Always call tools when a request can be solved via tools. For memory/list/timer requests, call tools first and do not answer from chat memory alone. Use exact tool parameter names only.

profiles._comment: Intent routing ceiling — hypothesis: deterministic dispatch eliminates repeated-store-bypass. Should score >=60% where LLM mode scores 0%.
profiles.name: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8-intent
